title: michelia balansae
intro: Michelia balansae, also known as the Balansa magnolia, is a species of evergreen flowering plant in the magnolia family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Michelia balansae include its ability to lower fever, relieve respiratory problems, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, decoctions, or infusions, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to create medicinal products.
